REVOKE PROBATION
ADDNL CONDS-6MCJ;CTS57D;ENROLL/COMPL DOM/PSYCHOLOGICAL PROG REQ BY APDWVD 84DAYS PUR 2900,5PC AL PURPOSESPROB EXT'D UNTIL 7/17/93

SP3Y(L);CTS397D;DEFT ADV PAROLE RTS
PD APPTD;REF APD S/R TO BE FILED 3/18/93;REMANDED
CONT ON PROB;ADDTL TERM OF PROB SUBM CNSLNG AS DETER BY APD
DEFT STIP VIO PROB;ADV W/CONSTL RTS;CT MKES FNDGS/ACCEPTS STIPMTR DA/APD DEN;ALL OTH T/C PROB PREV IMPOSED REM IN EFFECT
CNSL APPTD;REMANDED
DEFT APPEAR LATE;DEFT SURRENDERS AS HERETOFORE ORDERED
STY BODY ATTACHMT WILLIAMS/S&OLIVER/S GRTD;PROB REIN ALL T/C ORIG IMP MOD
6MCJ;WF OK IF QUALIFIES;CTS3D;NOCP/ER;STAY OF SURR 2/19/91
CT ORD B/A WILLIAMS/S & OLIVER/S STYD,BAIL EA-$1,000
PD DECL CONFLCT;PD RELV'D;BODY ATTACHMT WILLIAM/S & OLIVER/S STAY 1/17/91BAIL SET $5,000 EACH WITNESS
DEFT REMS ON OR
A/JWV;ISS3YPROB;CJ6M;CTS2D;NO CP/ER;W/S;REG11590HS;NO DRGS W/O RX;$100RF
$50LF;$25PC;REMAND

HTA, BAIL SET AT ORPJ
